claimText: The African Union joined the Coalition for Disaster Resilient Infrastructure (CDRI) as its 54th member.
evidenceExcerpt: African Union joined CDRI as the 54th member at the 7th ICDRI in France.
examUse: Statement-based question on recent international memberships and expansions of India-led initiatives.

claimText: The Coalition for Disaster Resilient Infrastructure (CDRI) was launched by India at the 2019 United Nations Climate Action Summit.
evidenceExcerpt: CDRI was launched by India at the 2019 United Nations Climate Action Summit.
examUse: Statement-based question on the origin and launching summit of CDRI.
distractorHooks: Launched by the United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP)
Launched at the Sendai Framework conference in 2015

claimText: India is the permanent co-chair of the Governing Council of the Coalition for Disaster Resilient Infrastructure (CDRI).
evidenceExcerpt: India is the permanent co-chair of the CDRI Governing Council.
examUse: Statement-based question on the governance and leadership structure of CDRI.
distractorHooks: India holds a rotating co-chair position
The UN Secretary-General is the permanent chair

claimText: Infrastructure for Resilient Island States (IRIS) and the Infrastructure Resilience Accelerator Fund (IRAF) are initiatives under the CDRI.
evidenceExcerpt: CDRI initiatives include Infrastructure for Resilient Island States (IRIS) and Infrastructure Resilience Accelerator Fund (IRAF).
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question matching global climate/disaster initiatives to their parent organizations.
distractorHooks: Initiatives under the International Solar Alliance (ISA)
Initiatives under the Global Environment Facility (GEF)

claimText: The Coastal Vulnerability Index (CVI) and Multi-Hazard Vulnerability Maps were developed by the Indian National Centre for Ocean Information Services (INCOIS).
evidenceExcerpt: Indian National Centre for Ocean Information Services (INCOIS) developed the Coastal Vulnerability Index (CVI) and Multi-Hazard Vulnerability Maps.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching environmental indices and maps to the publishing or developing agency.
distractorHooks: Developed by the National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA)
Developed by the India Meteorological Department (IMD)
Developed by the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC)
